command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Watching for 75s — send @SakuraChanAssistant_bot hello NOW ==="
LBG=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)
LBA=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/agent.log)

for i in $(seq 1 15); do
  sleep 5
  NEWG=$(tail -n +$((LBG+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null)
  INBOUND=$(echo "$NEWG" | grep "inbound message" | tail -1)
  RESPONSE=$(echo "$NEWG" | grep "response ready" | tail -1)
  NEWA=$(tail -n +$((LBA+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/agent.log 2>/dev/null)
  SEND_DENY=$(echo "$NEWA" | grep -iE "send_message.*denied\|denied.*send_message\|send_message.*error\|send_message.*blocked" | tail -1)
  SEND_OK=$(echo "$NEWA" | grep -iE "send_message completed" | tail -1)
  if [ -n "$INBOUND" ]; then echo "[HOP4 +$((i*5))s] RECEIVED: $INBOUND"; fi
  if [ -n "$SEND_DENY" ]; then echo "[TOOL +$((i*5))s] SEND_DENIED: $SEND_DENY"; fi
  if [ -n "$SEND_OK" ]; then echo "[TOOL +$((i*5))s] WARNING SEND_OK: $SEND_OK"; fi
  if [ -n "$RESPONSE" ]; then echo "[REPLY +$((i*5))s] SENT: $RESPONSE"; fi
done

echo ""
echo "=== Final check: any send_message activity? ==="
tail -n +$((LBA+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/agent.log 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "send_message" | tail -5
echo "=== Summary: inbound + response count ==="
echo "inbound: $(tail -n +$((LBG+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | grep -c inbound)"
echo "response: $(tail -n +$((LBG+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'response ready')"
REMOTE
